arts.ttl: PSG vs Manchester City – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday night in a crucial clash for both European heavyweights. The teams have each performed below their usual standards in Europe and are at risk of early elimination. PSG sit one place outside of the round of 16 playoff places after collecting seven points from six games. arts.ttl: Is this the end of an era at Man City? What we learned from their rivals' declines
arts.sum: Every generation has a dominant team, but all periods of dominance end -- just look at Liverpool in the 1990s and Man United in the 2010s. Have Man City begun their decline?

arts.ttl: Pressure on for Man City & PSG - could Champions League exit happen?
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Paris St-Germain on Wednesday with both sides battling to stay in the new-look Champions League - BBC Sport looks at what both teams need and what an early exit could mean.

arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in former Manchester City man – Player makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Under Mikel Arteta, Arsenal have been no strangers to signing former Manchester City players. Oleksandr Zinchenko, Gabriel Jesus and Raheem Sterling are already at the club, but it seems as if the Gunners could have potentially signed another former Manchester City player. arts.sum: Matheus Cunha quickly established himself as a key player for Wolverhampton Wanderers, impressing with his ability to play in various attacking roles. arts.ttl: Erling Haaland transfer verdict sees Alan Shearer dismiss nine-year contract at Man City
